text.value: The HTML fragment 'expansion-params.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/observation-gatewayDevice|5.3.0-ballot-tc1 is deprecated with the note: 'Use Device Gateway (device-gateway) extension which allows codeableReference (Device) in R6 and requires cross version extension for codeable reference.'

Wrong Display Name 'Heart—Systole; freq. = ? × 1/min' for http://npu-terminology.org#NPU21692. Valid display is one of choices: 'Heart—Systole; freq. = ? × 1/min' (en-GB) (for the language(s) 'da-DK')
'Heart—Systole; freq. = ? × 1/min' is the default display; the code system http://npu-terminology.org has no Display Names for the language da-DK

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '4.0.0', found versions: 3.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#6.5.0), 4.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' to 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode|4.0.0'
HL7 Defined CodeSystems should ensure that every concept has a display
HL7 Defined CodeSystems should ensure that every concept has a definition

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0131'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '3.0.0', found versions: 2.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#6.5.0), 3.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0131' to 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0131|3.0.0'

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0-ballot-tc1 released on 2025-08-03, but the most recent appropriate version is 5.2.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '4.0.0', found versions: 3.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#6.5.0), 4.0.0 (from hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode' to 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-RoleCode|4.0.0'
